title: Student's CV
body: This was my full CV before I even started my Software Engineering year, the final year of my studies. It feels like a small snapshot of the path that brought me here: telecommunications, computer engineering, projects, and the first signs of the software engineer I was becoming.

title: An Old Image While Refereeing
body: Watching from the referee chair, trying the post feature of my portfolio. The photo was taken in 2022.
